_comment: Stage-4 design+technical_analysis hook manifest. Contract target is tech-design.contract.yaml; stage=technical_analysis in gate completion check.

hooks.purpose: Set tech-design.contract.yaml pending_reviewer_recheck=true after tech-design.md edit.
Block harness gate/contract advance when tech-design.contract.yaml pending_reviewer_recheck=true.
Block harness mission stage complete technical_analysis when gate has not passed.
